title: epiphyllum quezaltecum
intro: Epiphyllum quezaltecum, a species of cactus, is a type of epiphytic plant that belongs to the family of Cactaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Epiphyllum quezaltecum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be dried and used as a powder or tincture in herbal preparations.
